title: Thelypteris pseudoamboinensis
taxonomy: Thelypteris pseudoamboinensis is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns commonly known as mosquito ferns or lady ferns. The family Thelypteridaceae is a part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and fern-like plants. This species is native to tropical regions and is often found growing in shaded, humid environments. Thelypteris pseudoamboinensis is a relatively small fern, with delicate fronds and a slender rhizome.
